title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at IDFC First Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at IDFC First Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
